comments.author: neutrinoceros
comments.body: not sure how to address this one. It is unclear where an exception *could* happen. I'm tempted to try and declare the function `noexcept`, though this hardly feels like a fix.

comments.author: devdanzin
comments.body: Maybe the fix for the specific issue is just a `try:`/`finally:` closing `space2`, what do you think? That's were I see it leaking.

comments.author: neutrinoceros
comments.body: I'm really not sure about what the cost would be. I think I remember `try` clauses getting much faster (basically free) somewhere around Python 3.10 (maybe 3.11 ?) but I don't know if that's also true in the C api that Cython maps to ?
